member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ChainFrequencies
member.summary: This class represents the frequencies of all oscillators/fublets for a given chain.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ChainFrequencies.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ChainFrequencies.AddFrequency(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double)
member.summary: Adds the frequency value to its corresponding oscillator/fublet combination.
member.param: Fublet name.
Oscillator name.
Calculated frequency.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ChainFrequencies.PrintToItuff(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Print frequencies data for all chains to ituff. Frequencies printing from oscillators is skipped depending on input JSON file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ChainFrequencies.GetFrequenciesForOscillator(Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations)
member.summary: Gets a list of frequencies for a all oscillator/fublet that match the ones indicated on the calculation parameter.
member.param: The calculation that contains oscillator/fublets to find its frequency.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ChainFrequencies.AddIgnoredOscillator(System.Int32)
member.summary: Add an oscillator to ignored list.
member.param: C.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.StatisticType
member.summary: Enum for statistic types.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.StatisticType.Median
member.summary: Median.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.StatisticType.Mean
member.summary: Mean.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.StatisticType.Minimum
member.summary: Minimum.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.StatisticType.Maximum
member.summary: Maximum.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.StatisticType.StdDeviation
member.summary: Standard Deviation.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.StatisticType.FubletsCount
member.summary: Fublets Count.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.StatisticType.Count
member.summary: Count of Fublets within a range.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations
member.summary: Represents an statistic that is applied to matching frequencies of N fublets associated to an oscillator.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets an identifier name to be printed to ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations.Oscillators
member.summary: Sets the oscillator names.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations.OscillatorValues
member.summary: Gets the oscillators as integers.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations.Statistic
member.summary: Gets or sets the statistic to be applied.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations.IsExported
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this calculation is exported to ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations.Fublets
member.summary: Sets a list of fublets to apply to the statistic. Dash separated range is supported.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations.FubletValues
member.summary: Gets the fublets as integers.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations.LowerCountLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets a lower limit for the Count type of statistic.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations.HigherCountLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets a higher limit for the Count type of statistic.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations.LowerLimitKill
member.summary: Gets or sets a lower limit for the Limit Kill feature.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations.HigherLimitKill
member.summary: Gets or sets a higher limit for the Limit Kill feature.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations.ProcessLimitKill
member.summary: Gets or sets process limit for the Limit Kill feature.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.CalculationsTableJsonFile
member.summary: This class is used to represent the Calculations table JSON file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.CalculationsTableJsonFile.CalculationList
member.summary: Gets or sets a list of all calculations to process.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Chain
member.summary: This class represents .

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Chain.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the chain type.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Chain.Delay
member.summary: Gets or sets the chain delay.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Chain.CapturePin
member.summary: Gets or sets the chain pin.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Chain.CounterWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets counter width for this chain.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Chain.Fublets
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of fublets for this chain.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Fublet
member.summary: This class represents the fublets circuit structures.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Fublet.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets name of the fublet.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Fublet.FubletTypes
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of fublet types.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.IdvStructureJsonFile
member.summary: This class holds the json structure for idv file configuration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.IdvStructureJsonFile.CounterWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets how many bits are in a fublet.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.IdvStructureJsonFile.TapGroupElement
member.summary: Gets or sets the TAP group for the configuration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.IdvStructureJsonFile.OscillatorGroups
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of Oscillator groups.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.OutputType
member.summary: Dictates the output type that can be used in the idv structure json file.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.OutputType.Frequencies
member.summary: Only frequencies are printed to ituff.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.OutputType.None
member.summary: No frequencies are printed to ituff.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.OutputType.Custom
member.summary: Custom for extendable methods, defined by user.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Oscillator
member.summary: This class represents the oscillator structure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Oscillator.Number
member.summary: Gets or sets oscillator number/identifier.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Oscillator.Cycles
member.summary: Gets or sets the cycles used to calculate fublet frequencies.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Oscillator.DataInPattern
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the data for this oscillator is in the pattern to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Oscillator.Divider
member.summary: Gets or sets divider used to calculate fublet frequencies.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Oscillator.OutputType
member.summary: Gets or sets the output type for this oscillator.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.OscillatorGroup
member.summary: This class represents the oscillator group structure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.OscillatorGroup.FubletType
member.summary: Gets or sets the type used to associate this group to a fublet.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.OscillatorGroup.Oscillators
member.summary: Gets or sets list of oscillators of this group.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Parser
member.summary: This class is in charge of parsing the IDV configuration files.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Parser.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.Idv.Wrappers.IFileWrapper)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: IFileWrapper mock object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Parser.ParseCalculationsTableFile(System.String)
member.summary: Parses calculations table file.
member.param: IFileWrapper mock object.
member.returns: Returns calculations table object and its last modified time.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Parser.ParseIdvStructureFile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Parses IDV structure file.
member.param: IFileWrapper mock object.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.TapGroup
member.summary: This class represents the TAP group.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.TapGroup.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the type for this TAP group.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.TapGroup.Chains
member.summary: Gets or sets list of chains for this TAP group.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.Idv
member.summary: Intra-die variation test method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.Idv.#ctor(System.Double,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Intra-die variation test method.
member.param: Tap (Test Access Port) frequency.
Expected quantity of chains.
Controls if the raw/frequencies data is logged into ITUFF.
True if using Midas for ituff, false otherwise.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.Idv.CalculateFrequenciesForAllChains(Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.IdvStructureJsonFile,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.OscillatorGroup})
member.summary: Calculates the frequencies for oscillators/fublets for all chains.
member.param: Json structure for idv file configuration.
CTV data resulting from pattern execution.
Dictionary of oscillators associated to a fublet.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.Idv.CalculateRollUpData(Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.CalculationsTableJsonFile)
member.summary: This method calculate the statistics/roll up data for all calculations from calculation table file.
member.param: Json structure for calculations table file configuration.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.IPrimeIdvExtensions
member.summary: Class to define extendable methods.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.IPrimeIdvExtensions.CalculateFrequenciesForAllChains(Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.IdvStructureJsonFile,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.OscillatorGroup})
member.summary: Provides entry point to define custom order to calculate the frequencies for all chains.
member.param: Contains all the information read from input file.
Bit string with captured CTV data.
Dictionary of oscillators associated to a fublet.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.IPrimeIdvExtensions.CalculateRollUpData(Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.CalculationsTableJsonFile)
member.summary: Provides entry point to define custom order to print data to ituff.
member.param: Contains all the information read from input file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod
member.summary: Intra-die variation (IDV) test method.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.fileWrapper
member.summary: fileWrapper for File static class mocking capabilities.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.Idv.Wrappers.IFileWrapper)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: IFileWrapper mock object.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.RawDataLoggingControl
member.summary: Enum for RawDataLoggingControl values.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.RawDataLoggingControl.Disabled
member.summary: Raw data logging disabled.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.RawDataLoggingControl.Enabled
member.summary: Raw data logging enabled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.TapFrequency
member.summary: Gets or sets Tap Frequency value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.CalculationsTableFile
member.summary: Gets or sets CalculationsTableFile file name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.IdvStructureFile
member.summary: Gets or sets Idv Structure configuration file name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.TriggerMapName
member.summary: Gets or sets comma seperated high limits for the measure pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.RawDataLogging
member.summary: Gets or sets if the raw data is logged into ITUFF or not.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.PrimeIdvTestMethod.IdvChains
member.summary: Gets or sets ChainTable object, contains the logic to calculate IDV frequencies.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.RollUpStatistic
member.summary: This class is in charge of the handle of roll up/statistic information for all entry in calc table file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.RollUpStatistic.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Double},Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations,System.Collections.Concurrent.ConcurrentBag{System.String}@)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The frequencies to be used in this statistics.
The calculation object from calc table file to applied the statistics.
Accumulates console output.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.RollUpStatistic.GetItuffWriter(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Prints calculation data to ituff.
member.param: The session context.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.RollUpStatistic.ExportToSharedStorage(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Exports the calculation information to shared storage if needed.
member.param: The session context.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.RollUpStatistic.EvaluateKillLimits(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluates the calculation limits for Limit Kill.
member.param: The session context.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.RollUpStatistic.CalculateMinimumFrequency(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Double})
member.summary: Calculates the min value for all fublets of an oscillator.
member.param: Frequencies to calculate the min value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.RollUpStatistic.CalculateMaximumFrequency(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Double})
member.summary: Calculates the max value for all fublets of an oscillator.
member.param: Frequencies to calculate the max value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.RollUpStatistic.CalculateNumberOfZeroFrequency(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Double})
member.summary: Calculates the number of frequencies with value equals 0 for all fublets of an oscillator.
member.param: Frequencies to calculate the 0 values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.RollUpStatistic.CalculateMeanFrequency(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Double})
member.summary: Calculates the mean for all fublets of an oscillator.
member.param: Frequencies to calculate the mean.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.RollUpStatistic.CalculateMedianFrequency(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Double})
member.summary: Calculates the median for all fublets of an oscillator.
member.param: Frequencies to calculate the median.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.RollUpStatistic.CalculateStdDevFrequency(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Double},System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Calculates the std deviation for all fublets of an oscillator.
member.param: Frequencies to calculate the std deviation.
Mean used in std deviation formula.
Counter of zeros to apply to std deviation formula.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.RollUpStatistic.CalculateValue(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Double},Prime.TestMethods.Idv.ConfigurationFile.Calculations)
member.summary: Calculates the needed statistic according to calculation object.
member.param: Frequencies to calculate the std deviation.
The calculation object from calc table file to be computed.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.Wrappers.FileWrapper
member.summary: Wrapper class to wrap System.IO.File methods used in this file to be able to mock them for unit testing.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.Wrappers.FileWrapper.ReadAllText(System.String)
member.summary: Reads all text from a File.
member.param: Path to the file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.Wrappers.IFileWrapper
member.summary: Interface to wrap System.IO.File methods used in this file to be able to mock them for unit testing.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idv.Wrappers.IFileWrapper.ReadAllText(System.String)
member.summary: Reads all text from a File.
member.param: Path to the file.
